verses.text: David leh nasepna-ah a ukpite in zong laia lasaknate, harp lasaknate, leh daltuahte tawh Pasian thu a gen dingin Asaf, Heman, leh Jeduthun-te' tapate pawlkhat nasepna-a dingin koihtuam uh hi. Na a semte leh amau' nasepte
Asaf' tapate sung panin: Kumpipa' makaihna nuai-ah Pasian' thu a gen Asaf' makaihna nuai-ah Asaf' tapate Zakkur, Josef, Nethaniah, leh Asharelah ahi hi

Jeduthun' sung panin Jeduthun' tapate: Lungdam kohna leh Topa phatna-in laia lasakna tawh thu a gen, a pa uh Jeduthun' makaihna nuai-ah Gedaliah, Zeri, Jeshaiah, Shimei, Hashabiah, leh Mattithiah, guk pha uh hi
Heman sung panin Heman' tapate: Bukkiah, Mattaniah, Uzziel, Shebuel, Jerimoth, Hananiah, Hanani, Eliathah, Giddalti, Romamtiezer, Joshbekashah, Mallothi, Hothir, leh Mahazioth ahi hi
Hihte khempeuh pen Pasian thuciamna bangin amah a pahtawi dingin kumpipa' thumupa Heman' tapate ahi hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in Heman tungah tapa sawmleli leh tanu thum pia hi

Amaute khempeuh Pasian' biakinn nasepna dingin Topa' biakinn sungah daltuahte, harp lasaknate, leh laia lasaknate tawh la lamsangah a pa uh ukna nuai-ah om uh hi. Asaf, Jeduthun, leh Heman-te pen kumpipa' thupiakna nuai-ah om uh hi
A Levi mipihte uh tawh Topa-a' ding lasakna lamah sinna a nei a siam mi a vekpi-in za nih leh sawmgiatlegiat ahi hi
Tua ciangin a neu a lian, sia leh a sinte a kibangin, amaute in amau' nasep ding uh ai a san uh hi
Asaf' behte-a' dingin ai masa Josef tungah tu hi. A nihna Gedaliah, a sanggamte, leh a tapate, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A thumna Zakkur, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A lina Izri, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A ngana Nethaniah, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A gukna Bukkiah, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sagihna Jesharelah, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A giatna Jeshaiah, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A kuana Mattaniah, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmna Shimei, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmlekhatna Azarel, a tapate leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmlenihna Hashabiah, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmlethumna Shubael, a tapate leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmlelina Mattithiah, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmlengana Jeremoth, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmlegukna Hananiah, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmlesagihna Joshbekashah, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmlegiatna Hanani, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmlekuana Mallothi, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmnihna Eliathah, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmnihlekhatna Hothir, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmnihlenihna Giddalti, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmnihlethumna Mahazioth, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung tu hi
A sawmnihlelina Romamtiezer, a tapate, leh a sanggamte, sawmlenih tung a tu hi.
